name: openEuler sig-Hygon SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-Hygon SIG maintains 4 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Hygon SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for openEuler Hygon SIG. The SIG has 12 core members and maintains 4 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Hygon SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Hygon SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-hygon@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Hygon SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Hygon SIG maintains 4 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Hygon.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Hygon SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Hygon SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Hao Feng, Xin Jiang, Wei Li. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
